description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a covered porch supported by columns, and a prominent entryway. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, and mature trees and shrubs are landscaped around the property. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area, and additional greenery, providing ample outdoor living space. The side and rear views reveal a mix of window sizes and a fenced area, suggesting privacy and family-oriented design. The overall style is reminiscent of Colonial Revival homes, with balanced proportions and classic detailing.
description: A two-story white house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, driveway, and landscaped yard with a pool in the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway with cars, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, backyard pool, patio, and side landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, smaller windows, and a tree-lined backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional greenery along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with covered porch, columns, steps, and decorative trim
